action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 1 crashed with exit code 139 (segfault) after 960s with no stdout. Analysis: Exit code 139 in PyTorch+PyG almost always stems from DataLoader multiprocessing (num_workers > 0) forking after CUDA initialization. The child processes inherit corrupted CUDA contexts and segfault. Decision: Remove num_workers (set to 0) in both train.py and predict.py. Run a minimal 1-epoch test to verify the pipeline works and measure iteration time before scaling up.
